function: () => { const w = window.innerWidth; const r = { viewport: w, docScrollWidth: document.documentElement.scrollWidth, hasHorizontalScroll: document.documentElement.scrollWidth > w + 1, overflowingEls: [] }; document.querySelectorAll('*').forEach(el => { const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect(); if (rect.right > w + 1 && rect.width > 0) { r.overflowingEls.push({ tag: el.tagName.toLowerCase(), cls: el.className?.toString().slice(0, 40) || '', right: Math.round(rect.right), width: Math.round(rect.width) }); } }); r.totalOverflowing = r.overflowingEls.length; return r; }
